metals_api_com.note: Exchange-traded metals converted to standard industry units. OTC/rare earth/minor metal prices shown as provided by API — industry benchmark pricing (Fastmarkets, Asian Metal, SMM) may use different units.

neodymium.name: Neodymium
neodymium.note: Nd metal (Metals-API). Benchmark: Fastmarkets, Asian Metal, SMM in USD/kg oxide

praseodymium.note: Pr metal (Metals-API). Benchmark: Fastmarkets, Asian Metal, SMM in USD/kg oxide

dysprosium.name: Dysprosium
dysprosium.note: Dy metal (Metals-API). Benchmark: Fastmarkets, Asian Metal, SMM in USD/kg oxide

manganese.name: Manganese
manganese.note: Mn (Metals-API). Benchmark: Mn ore USD/dmtu, EMM USD/t
